settings.ggKRG7l40ZB_text:
We updated our name and packaging to better reflect the true Italian identity of our brand.

 

The formulas? Exactly the same.

 

Same ingredients, same quality, same lab on the Amalfi Coast.

Just a new look.

 

We hope you like it as much as we do
settings.ggKZrkCgfQz_text:
Here's the honest truth: SerlinoLab works for the vast majority of men, but we can't promise it works for absolutely everyone.

 

Our formula has delivered results for thousands of Italian men aged 40+. The clinical studies prove it - 87% see significant wrinkle reduction in 8 weeks. But every man's skin is different, and we'd be lying if we said it's 100% guaranteed for everyone.

 

That's exactly why we offer the 60-day money-back guarantee. We don't want your money if SerlinoLab doesn't give you the younger, firmer skin you're looking for. Try it for two full months - if you don't see dramatic improvements, we'll refund every penny.
settings.ggLuQ0nuQN8_text:
NO at the moment the SerlinoLab cream is only available on our website.

 

We just launched in the US and we have a very limited batch available.
settings.ggNgskm7d42_text:
Men notice improvements from the very first use, but the real transformation happens week by week.

 

Week 1-2: skin feels immediately smoother and more hydrated. People start saying "you look rested today."

 

Week 6-8: This is where the magic happens. 93% of men see a significant reduction in wrinkles and fine lines. Skin looks visibly younger, and people start asking "what's your secret?"

 

The science behind it: SerlinoLab works deep beneath the surface to stimulate collagen production - that's why it takes 6-8 weeks for the dramatic results. Unlike basic moisturizers that just sit on top, omnis uses a bio-identical form of Vitamin A your skin naturally stores. Your body recognizes it. It welcomes it in. So you get the collagen rebuilding of a prescription cream, with the gentleness of a moisturizer. All gain. No burn.

 

Here's the best part: 60 days to see these results risk-free. If you don't look in the mirror after 8 weeks and see noticeably younger, firmer skin, we'll refund every penny. Thousands of men across Italy are already experiencing this transformation - try it yourself with zero risk.
settings.ggR8kqovO2L_text:
1 bottle lasts exactly 1 month with daily use - which is why we recommend at least 2.

 

Month 1 gives initial improvements, but month 2 is when 93% of men see dramatic results. Most men desperately search for more after seeing early changes.

 

Plus our 60-day money-back guarantee covers your entire transformation journey.
settings.ggVLmbUDTCI_text: "I've been using it for 2 months... nobody believes my real age anymore!"

settings.ggU84KAzI43_text:
A powerful antioxidant sourced from organic groves in Marche, Italy. Protects your skin barrier from environmental damage while deeply nourishing overnight.

 

BENEFITS:

  • Shields skin from daily damage
  • Nourishes without clogging pores
  • Restores natural moisture balance
settings.ggkvOXZntCM_text: They don't just hydrate, but actively fight the signs of time
settings.ggq2VeAT1Um_text:
A bio-identical form of Vitamin A your skin recognizes as its own. Gentler than harsh retinol, it stimulates collagen production without redness or peeling.

 

BENEFITS:

  • Stimulates collagen production
  • Reduces wrinkles and fine lines
  • Firms and tightens skin over time
settings.ggtOVHAQdCx_text:
A low molecular weight form of hyaluronic acid that penetrates deeper than regular HA. Fills wrinkles from within for visible plumping.

 

BENEFITS:

  • Penetrates deeper than standard HA
  • Fills wrinkles from the inside
  • Plumper, more hydrated skin
